Implemented the ARC2 task package for `50a16a69`. The rule is: strip the uniform bottom/right mask with `compress`, recover the minimal alternating periodic motif from the exposed square, then retile the full grid with that motif shifted one cell left. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` or new primitives were needed.
